habits.historyHelp3: The last 5 days are shown with a border and can be tapped to toggle status (completed → failed → none).
habits.historyHelp4: Complete 10 consecutive days to earn a rocket. Rockets can rescue a past failed day (only days older than 5 days).
habits.establishedToggleDesc: This habit is already part of your life. It's removed from the daily checklist and only its lifetime effect is shown.

habits.lifetimeEffectHeading: What this habit brings you for the rest of your life

auth.loginTagline: Evidence-based habits that change your life

discover.title: Discover
discover.sortLead: Pick a metric to grow — habits reorder by their impact on it

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.noEvidence: You can create a habit without evidence
evidence.weightAbout: Changing the weight multiplies the evidence impact values. For example, setting 'Quit Smoking' to 50% matches a goal to cut tobacco by half.

health_lifespan.headline: Toward a self that stays healthy longer
health_lifespan.name: Healthy lifespan
health_lifespan.description: Records how many minutes your habits add to your healthy lifespan

positive_mood.headline: Toward a self that spends time feeling positive
positive_mood.name: Time feeling positive
positive_mood.description: Records how many minutes of feeling positive you gain

cost_saving.headline: Toward a self that never gives up because of money
cost_saving.name: Cost saving
cost_saving.description: Records how much (yen) you can cut from your lifetime spending

earning.headline: Toward a self with the power to earn
earning.name: Income Growth
earning.description: Records how much (yen) your lifetime income growth rises

preset.daily_cardio_habit: Do 15+ min of slightly-out-of-breath exercise every day
preset.solid_sleep: Get 6-8 hours of sleep every day
preset.eat_vegetables_habit: Eat 5 servings (about 350g) of vegetables and fruit a day
preset.drink_water_habit: Drink 8 glasses (about 1.5L) of water every day
preset.quit_sugar_habit: Keep added sugar under 25g/day (about one 250ml soft drink)
preset.quit_junk_food_habit: Limit junk food (snacks, instant noodles, fast food) to 2x a week or less
preset.daily_strength_habit: Do strength training 2-3 times a week (bodyweight is fine)
preset.fermented_food_habit: Eat one fermented food a day (natto, miso, yogurt, etc.)
preset.daily_journaling_habit: Write a journal to let your feelings out every day
preset.time_in_nature_habit: Spend 20 minutes in nature every day
preset.social_connection_habit: Have a heart-to-heart conversation every day
preset.morning_light_habit: Get 10+ minutes of outdoor light within an hour of waking

intro.title: How much difference will your daily habits make over a lifetime?
intro.subtitle: Just answer a few questions. We’ll diagnose how much impact your habits create over a lifetime for the you of today.
intro.note: Every number is calculated based on scientific research

profile.title: Tell us about yourself
profile.subtitle: We use this to calculate your lifetime impact just for you.
profile.incomeNote: If left blank, we calculate using the average income for your age, gender, and country

habits.liveLead: What your established habits bring you
habits.impactLead: What this habit brings you over the rest of your life
habits.ask: Is this a habit for you right now?

most.label: Mostly
most.desc: I do it most of the time

sometimes.label: Sometimes
sometimes.desc: I do it when I remember

habitSub.daily_cardio_habit: You do 15+ minutes of slightly-out-of-breath exercise (brisk walking, light jogging, etc.) every day.
habitSub.solid_sleep: You get 6-8 hours of sleep every day.
habitSub.eat_vegetables_habit: You eat 5 servings (about 350g) of vegetables and fruit a day.
habitSub.drink_water_habit: You drink 8 glasses (about 1.5L) of water every day.
habitSub.quit_sugar_habit: You keep added sugar (sweet drinks, sweets) under 25g a day. One 250ml soft drink is about 25g. It doesn’t have to be zero — small amounts have little effect.
habitSub.quit_junk_food_habit: You keep ultra-processed foods (snacks, instant noodles, fast food) to 2 times a week or less. Less is better.
habitSub.daily_strength_habit: You do strength training (bodyweight is fine) 2-3 times a week. Muscles need recovery, so 2-3 times a week works better than every day.
habitSub.fermented_food_habit: You eat one fermented food a day, such as natto, miso, or yogurt.
habitSub.quit_smoking_for_health: You don’t smoke a single cigarette. Even one cigarette greatly reduces the effect, so “sometimes” and “mostly” can’t be selected.
habitSub.daily_meditation_habit: You take 10+ minutes to meditate every day.
habitSub.daily_journaling_habit: You write a journal to let your feelings out every day.
habitSub.time_in_nature_habit: You spend 20 minutes in nature every day.
habitSub.social_connection_habit: You have a conversation every day where you and someone share how you’re doing and how you feel.
habitSub.morning_light_habit: You get 10+ minutes of outdoor light within an hour of waking every day.
habitSub.quit_alcohol_habit: You keep alcohol under 100g a week (about five 500ml beers / five go of sake). Research links over 100g/week to a shorter lifespan; zero is the lowest risk.

calculating.title: Calculating your lifetime…
calculating.phase3: Calculating the impact on the rest of your life…

result.title: The impact your habits create
result.lead: The gap between your current pace and 100% established is your room to grow
result.sectionsLead: See how the habits you chose move each of the four metrics.
result.summaryLabel: The four metrics at a glance
result.footnote: You can review the assumptions (age, gender, country, income) in settings anytime

health_lifespan.body: Advances in medicine keep pushing average lifespan higher. But years added while your body can't move freely don't necessarily add to a fulfilling life. The stretch of time you stay healthy, move freely, and live on your own terms is your "healthy lifespan." Research shows the habits you chose extend this healthy lifespan compared with going without them.

positive_mood.body: Time spent feeling positive is more than just feeling good. Research links positive emotion with better physical and mental health, work productivity, and stronger relationships. Cutting the hours lost to low mood or irritability, and growing the time you feel good, adds up to more fulfilling days.

cost_saving.body: Illness and poor health pile up as lifetime costs — treatment, visits, medication. Research shows daily habits can curb these future expenses.

earning.body: Stamina and focus underpin your work performance and income growth. Research shows that building this base through habits contributes to how much your lifetime income rises.

kpiSelect.title: What do you want more of in your life?
kpiSelect.lead: Pick the one you most want to grow. We’ll suggest habits that move it.

health_lifespan.desc: Not just how long you live — how long you stay healthy and free to live on your own terms, without major illness or care. Habits can extend this period.

positive_mood.desc: The hours of your day spent feeling positive instead of low or irritable. Habits can grow your good-mood time.

cost_saving.desc: Illness and poor health pile up lifetime costs — treatment, visits, medication. Habits can cut those expenses.

earning.desc: Stamina and focus drive your work performance and income growth. Habits build the base for earning more.

habitSelect.title: Choose habits to work on
habitSelect.lead: Ranked by impact on “{kpi}”, with your current level for each.
habitSelect.empty: You’ve already built every habit for this area. Go ahead and start.
habitSelect.note: You can add or change habits anytime. You can also start without choosing.

hero.title: Join early, and the discount stays with you for good.
hero.subtitle: Smitch is just getting started. The people who help us early deserve to be treated well for the long run — so a Founding Member discount stays with your account, permanently.

tiers.heading: Two Founding Member tiers

founder50.name: First members
founder50.description: The earliest supporters receive 50% off, locked in permanently.

founder30.name: Next members
founder30.description: The next group receives 30% off, also locked in permanently.

tiers.note: When the seats are taken, that's it — no fake countdowns, no resets. The numbers above, when shown, are the real remaining counts.

promise.heading: We'll have your back first
promise.body: Founding Members are prioritized when you reach out to us. Your questions, your reports, your ideas go to the front of the line. You helped us begin, and we don't forget that.

waitlist.heading: Tell us you're interested
waitlist.description: We're not charging anything yet. Leave your email and we'll let you know when Founding Member seats open. No spam, just the one message that matters.
waitlist.success: Thank you. You're on the list — we'll reach out when seats open.
waitlist.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

items.a: Yes. As long as your Founding Member account stays active, the discount applies to your billing for good. It's our way of thanking the people who showed up early.
There's a card-free trial when billing launches, so you can try Smitch before deciding. Joining the waitlist costs nothing and commits you to nothing.
Always. You can cancel whenever you like, with no penalty and no questions. We'd rather you stay because Smitch helps, not because leaving is hard.
We only use it to tell you when Founding Member seats open. We don't sell it or send unrelated marketing. You can ask us to delete it at any time.

checkout.title: Confirm your purchase
checkout.subtitle: Please review the details below before continuing.
checkout.recurringBody: This plan is a recurring subscription. It renews automatically at the end of each billing period and your payment method is charged automatically.
checkout.trialBody: After your {days}-day free trial ends, the plan converts to paid automatically and the first charge ({price}) is made. If you cancel during the trial, you are not charged.
checkout.cancelBody: You can cancel anytime via the Stripe Customer Portal from the billing settings. After you cancel, you will not be charged again, and you keep full access until the end of your current billing period. There is no cancellation penalty or fee.
checkout.lifetimeBody: This plan is a one-time payment. It is not a subscription, so there is no auto-renewal or recurring charge.
checkout.taxNote: All prices shown are tax-inclusive totals. The displayed price equals the amount charged.
checkout.tokushohoLinkText: See the Commercial Transaction Act Disclosure for full transaction terms.

billing.subscriptionStatus: You currently have an active paid plan.

billing.cancelAnytime: Cancel anytime. You can complete cancellation yourself via the Customer Portal above, with no cancellation penalty or fee. After you cancel, you keep full access until the end of your current billing period.
